title: Applicability
doc_html:
CHAPTER 14.  MODIFICATION OF DISPOSITION

Art. 786.  Applicability

In all cases except a disposition committing the child to the custody of a child care agency, the provisions of this Chapter shall be applicable.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §7.
